_doc: pets axis sub-SSOT — parent: ../_index.json (pets key). Created 2026-05-01 to host companion-animal domains (consumer-product + animal-behavior + small-scale material-science intersection). Distinct from life axis (clinical/agricultural/pharmacological) and materials axis (industrial-scale fabrics/concrete/ceramics): pets axis is for the consumer-pet-care surface where consumer product engineering meets animal behavior + small-scale material science (litter / food / toy / habitat).

_meta._category_name: companion animal care: litter, food, toy, habitat, behavior — consumer-product + small-scale material-science + animal-behavior intersection
_meta._honesty_note: _verified_count / _alien_index_avg null on creation; populate from atlas.n6 aggregation once the first MVP measurements land per per-domain falsifier deadlines.

_changelog: 1.0.0 (2026-05-01): pets axis sub-SSOT created. cat-litter registered (consumer companion-animal hygiene material; n6 invariant projection sigma(6)=12 bentonite swelling ratio (12x dry volume; Wyoming Na-bentonite reference) / tau(6)=4 odor-neutralization tiers (carbon-adsorption / zeolite-ion-exchange / pH-buffer / antimicrobial) / phi(6)=2 grain-mode binary (fine-clumping / coarse-non-clumping) / sopfr(6)=5 primary minerals (bentonite / silica-gel / zeolite / perlite / charcoal) / J_2(6)=24 hour odor-suppression industry baseline; verdict tier DRAFT per raw 69 (theoretical-analytical with literature-anchored material constants, not yet empirical lab measurement); F-CL-MVP-1 90-day MVP gate 2026-07-30 — manufacture 1 kg test batch + measure swell-ratio / clump-strength / dust-PM2.5 against the 4 raw 71 falsifiers preregistered).

n6_mapping.sigma_6_eq_12: Wyoming Na-bentonite swelling ratio (12x dry volume; Grim 1968)
n6_mapping.tau_6_eq_4: 4-tier odor neutralization (carbon adsorption / zeolite ion-exchange / pH-buffer / antimicrobial)
n6_mapping.sopfr_6_eq_5: 5 primary minerals (bentonite / silica-gel / zeolite / perlite / charcoal)

falsifiers: F-CL-MVP-1 (2026-07-30): 1 kg test batch swell-ratio measurement < 8x → retract sigma=12 mapping
F-CL-MVP-2 (2026-07-30): clump 24h-failure-stress < 50 kPa @ saturation → retract clump-strength target
F-CL-MVP-3 (2026-07-30): dust PM2.5 emission > 200 µg/m³ during 1-min pour → retract dust-control claim
F-CL-MVP-4 (2026-08-30): odor (NH3 + H2S) breakthrough < 24h at 30°C / 70% RH → retract J_2=24 hour target
